_instructions: Define label language, content, and format requirements for each country in the study. These are used by the Compliance Manager (CO-02) to validate shipments.

countries.format_notes: MHRA requires labels to be in English. Include storage conditions as 'Store at 2-8°C'. Caution statement should read 'For clinical trial use only'.
MHRA requires labels to be in French. Include storage conditions as 'Store at 2-8°C'. Caution statement should read 'For clinical trial use only'.
